name: Avocado-And-Scallop Ceviche
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Peanut oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lime juice, oil, peppercorns, salt, and pepper together in a glass or ceramic bowl.
2. Stir in the scallops, cover, and refrigerate for at least 4 hours while they marinate. They should become opaque during this time.
3. Mash the avocado until almost smooth, then add it along with the chives or scallions to the marinating scallops (do not drain them). Mix well. Set aside for at least half an hour, refrigerated.
4. About 30 minutes before serving, remove the stems from the mushrooms and wipe them clean of dirt. Combine the vegetable oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
5. Brush the insides of the mushrooms generously with the mixture.
6. Just before serving, drain the scallops and fill the mushroom caps with the scallop mixture.
7. Garnish with additional chives or scallions if desired.
